data.general: As Sun and Moon are in the 9th house, you may feel a sense of restlessness and desire for travel or higher education. However, with Mars in the 8th house, you need to be cautious of taking risks and avoid unnecessary conflicts. This is a good time to focus on your personal growth and spiritual development.
data.luck: With Jupiter in the 10th house, your luck is on the rise, and you may receive recognition or promotion at work. However, Saturn in the 6th house suggests that you need to work hard to achieve your goals and be prepared for challenges.
data.scope: Your scope of work and responsibilities may expand, and you may be given more authority or leadership roles. However, with Rahu in the 5th house, be careful of making impulsive decisions that may affect your relationships or career.
data.study: This is a good time to pursue higher education or take up new skills and knowledge. With Sun and Moon in the 9th house, you may feel a sense of curiosity and desire for learning. However, with Mars in the 8th house, you need to be disciplined and focused to achieve your academic goals.
data.love: With Venus in the 11th house, you may meet new people or join a social group that can help you find a romantic partner. However, with Ketu in the 11th house, there may be some delays or misunderstandings in your relationships.
data.travel: You may receive an invitation to travel or attend a conference that can help you expand your knowledge or network. With Sun and Moon in the 9th house, you may feel a sense of wanderlust and desire to explore new places.
